patterns.signature: kubelet Liveness probe failed: HTTP 404 from :9090/health
kubelet Killing container workflow-engine (liveness probe failed 3x), restartCount=<N>
workflow-engine call failed: dial tcp workflow-engine:8080 connection refused
Admin API HTTP 5xx: AI Teammate request failed 500
workflow-engine server listening on :8080, durable execution ready (app started cleanly)

note: platform-api has the HIGHEST count (4400) and PAGED. But workflow-engine's probe-failure pattern has the EARLIEST first_seen (19:02:10), before ai-agent's connection-refused (19:05:00) and platform-api's 5xx (19:08:00). Note workflow-engine ALSO logs a clean 'app started' pattern each cycle — the application is healthy; the kubelet kills it on a misconfigured probe. first_seen + the dependency direction reveal workflow-engine.
